description: Maintenance services contract MSA-2021-0156 expired June 30 2023 with no renewal executed. Services continued under implied contract creating legal and operational risk.
resolution_description: Under review. New agreement being negotiated.
root_cause: Renewal tracking gap. No automated expiration alerts configured.
preventive_action: Implement automated contract expiration alerts at 90 and 60 and 30 days prior to expiry.

description: ProMaintain Services insurance coverage (1M/2M CGL) falls below current policy minimum (2M/5M). Contoso not named as additional insured.
resolution_description: Pending contract renewal. Insurance update required as condition of new agreement.
root_cause: Contract predates January 2024 policy update (PROC-POL S6.1) and was not reviewed at policy change.
preventive_action: Add policy change trigger to review all active contracts against updated requirements.

description: ProMaintain Services industry safety certification from 2020 has expired (2-year validity). Maintenance organization certificate from 2019 requires renewal verification.
resolution_description: Requested updated certificates from vendor. Awaiting response.
root_cause: No systematic tracking of vendor certification expiration dates.
preventive_action: Add vendor certification tracking to compliance monitoring system.

description: GlobalServe Consulting Ltd IT consulting agreement GS-2024-1187 submitted with 18 major risk flags including unlimited Contoso liability and vendor-owned IP and no insurance requirements.
resolution_description: Contract flagged for comprehensive renegotiation. Execution blocked pending legal review.
root_cause: Vendor-drafted contract without Contoso legal input.
preventive_action: Require Contoso template or legal pre-review for all contracts over 500K.
